reasoning: Based on the FRED series CREACBW027SBOG, the data as of October 2025 shows a strong year-to-date upward trend (from ~$3,000B in Jan to ~$3,039B in Oct). Although 2024 saw a slight seasonal dip in Q4, the nominal drift of ~$1.2B/week in 2025 makes an increase more likely than a decrease for all dates. However, due to structural headwinds in the CRE market (office defaults and maturity walls) and the requirement to increase uncertainty for distant horizons, the probabilities decrease toward 0.5 for the later dates.
